nodes.name: Daily 6 AM ET
nodes.notes: Triggers every morning at 6:00 AM Eastern. Set workflow timezone in Settings → Timezone to America/New_York.

nodes.name: Fetch Disney Parks Blog RSS
nodes.notes: Pulls the latest Disney Parks Blog RSS as raw text. Use as one of the research inputs.

nodes.name: Fetch themeparks.wiki destinations
nodes.notes: Optional second research source — current ride status across parks.

nodes.name: Build research context
nodes.notes: Combines the RSS + themeparks.wiki output into a single object the LLM can read. Computes today's slug + display date in Eastern Time.

nodes.name: Compose with Claude
nodes.notes: Calls Claude to generate today's daily briefing JSON. Uses the Anthropic API credential — add yours under Credentials → Anthropic.

nodes.name: Validate + format JSON
nodes.notes: Parses the LLM output, validates the shape against lib/guideDaily.ts schema, and produces the file payload for GitHub. Throws (stops the workflow) on any schema violation — better to skip a day than ship a broken post.

nodes.name: Commit to GitHub
nodes.notes: Commits the JSON file to content/guide/daily/{slug}.json on the main branch. Cloudflare Pages auto-rebuilds on push — the post is live within ~60-90s.

nodes.name: Wait 90s for Cloudflare deploy
nodes.notes: Wait for Cloudflare Pages to rebuild before sending the email. The Beehiiv teaser should link to the live URL.

nodes.name: Beehiiv — Create Post (DRAFT)
nodes.notes: DISABLED until Beehiiv API key is created (requires Stripe ID verification). When ready: enable this node, add an HTTP Header Auth credential named 'Beehiiv API' with header name 'X-API-Key' and value = your Beehiiv API key. Note: posts created as 'draft' so you can review + send manually until the workflow is trusted; flip status to 'confirmed' to auto-send.
